question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_MAXSIZE environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads CommonDownloaderProperties, setting maxSize to 2 (the minimum allowed by @Min(2L)) to cause the Downloader to reject all legitimate stream files as oversized, halting ingestion and leaving balance data permanently stale?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the SPRING_DATASOURCE_HIKARI_MAXIMUM_POOL_SIZE=0 environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() initializes CommonConfiguration.hikariConfig(), causing the HikariDataSource to have no available connections, making all database writes fail silently and leaving the importer in a state where stream files are downloaded and verified but no transfer records are ever persisted?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DB_SSLMODE=DISABLE default (loaded during SpringApplication.run() via DBProperties) combined with a network-level man-in-the-middle attack to intercept and modify SQL INSERT statements for crypto_transfer records in transit, altering transfer amounts before they reach the database and causing incorrect balance state?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_PATHTYPE=NODE_ID environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads CommonDownloaderProperties, causing the Downloader to construct incorrect cloud storage paths that resolve to attacker-controlled directories containing fabricated stream files with fraudulent CryptoTransfer records?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_PATHPREFIX environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() initializes CommonDownloaderProperties, setting pathPrefix to a path that resolves to an attacker-controlled bucket prefix containing malicious stream files, bypassing the expected node directory structure and injecting fraudulent transfer records?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_ACCESSKEY and HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_SECRETKEY environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() initializes CommonDownloaderProperties.init(), causing the importer to authenticate to an attacker-controlled cloud storage account and download fabricated stream files containing fraudulent HBAR transfer records?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_CLOUDPROVIDER=LOCAL environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads CommonDownloaderProperties, causing the Downloader to read stream files from the local filesystem instead of cloud storage, and if the attacker can write to the local data path (via a separate vulnerability), inject fraudulent stream files that bypass cloud-level access controls?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DATAPATH environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads ImporterProperties, redirecting the data path to an attacker-controlled directory containing pre-crafted stream files, causing the importer to process fraudulent CryptoTransfer records and corrupt entity balances?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_INITIALADDRESSBOOK environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads ImporterProperties, pointing to an attacker-controlled address book file that contains malicious node public keys, causing NodeSignatureVerifier.verifySignature() to validate signatures made by the attacker's private keys and accept fraudulent stream files?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_NODEPUBLICKEY environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads ImporterProperties, overriding the expected node public key with an attacker-controlled key, causing NodeSignatureVerifier to accept stream files signed by the attacker's private key as legitimate consensus node signatures?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_IMPORTHISTORICALACCOUNTINFO=false environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads ImporterProperties, causing HistoricalAccountInfoMigration to be skipped, resulting in entity balances being initialized without historical account data and producing incorrect starting balances that propagate through all subsequent balance calculations?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_TOPICRUNNINGHASHV2ADDEDTIMESTAMP environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads ImporterConfiguration.flywayConfigurationCustomizer(), setting an incorrect timestamp that causes Flyway migrations to apply the wrong topic running hash version, corrupting the migration state and potentially causing subsequent balance migrations to fail or produce incorrect results?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_ENABLED=true and HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_RECORD_ENABLED=true environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() triggers ImporterConfiguration.init(), causing an IllegalStateException that prevents the importer from starting and halts all stream file ingestion, creating a denial-of-service that leaves balance data permanently stale?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_CUTOVER_ENABLED=true environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads block cutover properties, forcing the importer to switch from the verified record stream to the block stream prematurely, and if the block stream source is attacker-controlled, inject fraudulent transfer records during the cutover window?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_NODES_0_HOST environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads BlockProperties, pointing the block node connection to an attacker-controlled gRPC server that streams fabricated block items containing fraudulent CryptoTransfer records, bypassing the record stream's signature verification pipeline?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_STREAM_MAXBLOCKITEMS environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads block stream properties, setting an extremely large value to cause the block stream processor to allocate excessive memory when processing a single block, triggering an OutOfMemoryError that corrupts in-flight transfer records before they are committed to the database?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_BLOCK_LEDGER_LEDGERID environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads block ledger properties, providing an incorrect ledger ID that causes TssVerifier to validate block proofs against the wrong ledger, accepting blocks from a different network (e.g., testnet) as mainnet blocks and importing fraudulent transfer records?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_CACHE_ENABLED=false environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads cache properties, disabling the alias and EVM address caches, causing EntityRecordItemListener to fail to resolve account aliases in CryptoTransfer records and silently skip transfer entries, resulting in incomplete balance updates?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_CACHE_ALIAS specification (loaded during SpringApplication.run()) to set maximumSize=0, causing the alias cache to evict all entries immediately, forcing every CryptoTransfer with an alias-based account ID to perform a database lookup that may return stale or incorrect entity IDs, leading to transfers being credited to wrong accounts?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the SPRING_TASK_SCHEDULING_ENABLED=false environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() triggers ImporterConfiguration.SchedulingConfiguration, disabling all scheduled tasks including BalanceReconciliationService.reconcile() and stream file polling, halting all balance updates and leaving the mirror node serving permanently stale data?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DB_CONNECTIONINITSQL environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads DBProperties, injecting malicious SQL (e.g., SET search_path TO attacker_schema) that runs on every new HikariCP connection, causing all subsequent queries to operate on attacker-controlled schema tables instead of the legitimate mirror_node schema?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DB_LOADBALANCE=true default (loaded during SpringApplication.run()) combined with a compromised pgpool replica to intercept read queries from BalanceReconciliationService.reconcileCryptoTransfers(), returning manipulated crypto_transfer sums that cause the reconciliation to falsely report SUCCESS while actual balances are corrupted?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DB_PARTITION_ENABLED=false environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads PartitionProperties, disabling database partitioning, causing all crypto_transfer inserts to go into a single unpartitioned table that may hit size limits and start silently dropping rows, resulting in incomplete balance state?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_COMMON_SHARD and HIERO_MIRROR_COMMON_REALM environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads CommonProperties, causing EntityId.of() to resolve account IDs with incorrect shard/realm values, mapping transfer recipients to wrong entity IDs and crediting HBAR to incorrect accounts in the mirror node's balance state?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: Critical: Direct loss of funds'] [Function: main()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the HIERO_MIRROR_IMPORTER_DOWNLOADER_TIMEOUT environment variable injection before SpringApplication.run() loads CommonDownloaderProperties, setting timeout to 1 second, causing the Downloader to time out on every stream file download and retry indefinitely without ever successfully ingesting a file, halting balance updates?
